title: The Health And Safety Police   or Health and Safety Gone Mad - A Rant
description: This is all personal opinion - If you are one of the health and safety police don't get the idea I am inviting you in for a discussion - I am not! - I am purely venting at what I think is your misguided desire to control everything masquerading as public concern - If you want to have your say - open your own youtube channel and post your own video - don't bring your soapbox here - I hope you enjoy
